status: DRAFT — NOT YET COMMITTED OR TAGGED (founder final read-through pending; then de-DRAFT + tag).
axis: CD (co-design / objective-sharing) — partner varies ONLY in whether it was co-designed with the ego; same Panda embodiment on every partner (embodiment is the established null, NOT re-introduced).
purpose: One pre-registered, falsifiable-both-ways measurement that settles the heterogeneity axis on co-carry properly: (1) re-freeze a genuinely TRAINED learned incumbent on the FIXED task (compliant coupling K=8000 + the embodiment-invariant coupling-stress instrument + the corrected reward), replacing the hand-written cooperative-impedance stand-in every prior compliant-coupling headline (Rung-4b..4e) used; and (2) measure that frozen incumbent against two partner sets differing in EXACTLY ONE factor — co-design. Arm A = capability-matched CO-designed control-style partners (expected null, the control). Arm B = independently-competent but NON-co-designed partners (the regime the thesis is about). The Rung-2 STOP (854 N internal stress vs a frozen non-cooperating partner on this same task) is in-kit evidence the non-co-designed regime bites where the matched one does not; this run tests that directly, on the existing harness, against a trained incumbent.

governance.phase: Phase-2. Adds NO Phase-1 gate work (invariant I1). Informs the M7 / M10-narrative / D-046 Phase-1/2 scope call but does NOT decide it — that remains the founder's, post-results.
governance.black_box_partner_I3_ADR009: Partners enter only through the FrozenPartner interface; the _FORBIDDEN_ATTRS shield (interface.py) blocks train/learn/update/load_state_dict/named_parameters; the incumbent is an eval-only obs->action closure and never consumes partner internals. The reward is partner-agnostic: it penalises a physical coupling-stress force, never partner identity/class/objective (spec §11 anti-leakage).
governance.no_comm_schema_bump_I9: chamber.comm.SCHEMA_VERSION (ADR-003 wire format), chamber.evaluation.results.SCHEMA_VERSION (results/leaderboard), and the prereg-validator schema — the three I9-named schema constants — are ALL UNCHANGED. The freeze-manifest artifact version (cocarry_freeze.MANIFEST_SCHEMA: 'cocarry_freeze_manifest/v1' -> '/v2') is a SEPARATE module constant, not named SCHEMA_VERSION, not one of the three, and written as its own JSON artifact (not via chamber.evaluation.results) — so it is NOT transitively part of the results schema and bumping it triggers no new ADR. Confirmed against source.
governance.no_immutable_archive_edits_I8: Rung-2..4e archives untouched. The frozen Rung-2 rigid+wrist incumbent (artifacts/.../f6dad85ec9df4d58_step100000.pt) is preserved; this run produces a SEPARATE re-frozen incumbent on the fixed task.
governance.ai_attribution: none (scanned by make verify-no-ai-mentions across history)
governance.do_not_merge: STOP at the open PR for founder review.

ceiling_consistency_fix.why: BLOCKER resolved before lock. The committed env predicate hardcodes COCARRY_STRESS_MAX_PROXY_N=130 N (wrist) and the reward penalty defaults to threshold 110 / scale 20 (wrist-grounded). Under stress_measure='coupling' (matched coupling stress ~260-290 N) both are wrong: is_unstressed/success would never fire (so the training success bonus is dead) and the penalty saturates across the whole cooperative band — 'train against one constraint, judge against another'. The Rung-4c..4e eval-only scripts side-stepped this by recomputing success in the driver at f_max 365.6, which is fine for a search but FATAL for a training run whose reward reads info['success'].
ceiling_consistency_fix.implementation: Additive, byte-identical-preserving params on make_cocarry_env + make_cocarry_training_env: stress_max, stress_penalty_threshold, stress_penalty_scale, all default None -> the wrist constants (130/110/20), so the entire rigid+wrist ladder stays byte-identical (I8/P6). evaluate() judges is_unstressed against self._stress_max; the reward threads the grounded threshold/scale into cocarry_excess_stress_penalty. Tier-1 contract tests added (test_cocarry_tier1.py::TestSuccessPredicate::test_stress_max_param_selects_the_ceiling; test_cocarry_rung2_remediation_tier1.py::TestCouplingGroundedPenalty). ruff + pyright(strict) green.
ceiling_consistency_fix.training_and_eval_run_on_coupling_at_fma: CONFIRMED. Stage-3 training AND ALL Stage-4/5 eval run with stress_measure='coupling', drive_stiffness=8000.0, stress_max=365.6, and the coupling-grounded penalty. No code path judges the coupling task against the 130 N wrist ceiling.

fixed_task_substrate.coupling: compliant dual-hold, drive_stiffness=8000.0 N/m (Rung-4b K=8000; damping/force-limit at the rig defaults; drive_force_limit -> Variant-B saturation as in Rung-4c).
fixed_task_substrate.stress_measure: coupling — F = K_c * ||grip_frame_world - bar_end_world|| (cocarry.py::_coupling_stress_now), embodiment-invariant. The controlled same-deflection invariance check (Rung-4c, <=~1 N Panda-vs-other) stands and is re-confirmed in Stage 1.
fixed_task_substrate.fmax_status: HELD FIXED at the established Rung-4c/4e value (= 1.25 x matched-coupling success-stress p99 ~ 292.5 N). NOT re-derived per-incumbent. Stage 1 re-measures the matched-coupling distribution and REQUIRES f_max 365.6 to reconfirm consistent (measured matched success-stress p99 in the band below) else STOP.
fixed_task_substrate.fmax_consistency_band_basis: Centered on p99 = 292.5 N (the value that produced the fixed f_max 365.6 = 1.25 x p99). Lower bound 234 = p99 -20%. Upper bound CLOSED at 318 (asymmetric, by the grounding math, NOT a symmetric +20% which would be 351): at p99 > ~318 the fixed f_max and the grounding rule CROSS — threshold = 1.05 x p99 would exceed f_max (scale = 365.6 - threshold goes negative/degenerate, silently corrupting the Stage-3 training reward) AND f_max/p99 falls below 1.15 (matched episodes routinely fail the stress conjunct, collapsing the positive control). The upper bound 318 keeps f_max >= 1.15 x p99 AND penalty scale >= ~30 N. If the Stage-1 measured matched-coupling p99 lands outside [234, 318] -> STOP (substrate drift that invalidates the fixed f_max); do not re-derive f_max to fit.
fixed_task_substrate.success_predicate: is_placed & is_level & is_unstressed & both_static & is_settled (cocarry.py::evaluate) — the FULL joint conjunct, UNCHANGED. is_unstressed uses stress_max=365.6 on the coupling measure.
fixed_task_substrate.penalty_grounding_rule: Pre-registered RULE (numbers measured post-tag in Stage 1, frozen in the manifest): stress_penalty_threshold = round(1.05 x measured matched-coupling success-stress p99); stress_penalty_scale = 365.6 - threshold. Mirrors the wrist grounding (threshold 110 ~ 1.05 x p99 104.5; scale 20 ~ f_max 130.6 - 110). The fmax_consistency_band upper bound (318) guarantees scale >= ~30 N and f_max >= 1.15 x p99, so the rule and the fixed f_max cannot cross. NEVER weakened to admit a result.

manifest_new_fields: coupling_grounding (stress_measure, stress_max=365.6, grounded threshold/scale, measured matched-coupling p99)
refreeze.matched_cell: matched Panda pair (panda_wristcam ego + panda_partner), compliant K=8000, stress_measure=coupling, stress_max=365.6, coupling-grounded penalty, transport PBRS on (coeff=1.0, parity with env constant).

stage3_init_conditional.primary: FROM SCRATCH HAPPO on the fixed matched cell (reuses training_runner unchanged). Cleanest 'learned cooperation' provenance — defeats the hostile read that an Arm-A null is the robust impedance BASE rather than learned cooperation, since the incumbent shares NO machinery with the Arm-A control-style partners. Budget cap 900k steps; checkpoint cadence 50k.
stage3_init_conditional.early_stop_milestone: HARD CUTOFF at the 300k checkpoint (no soft trend — Rung-2's failure was non-monotonic wandering, so trend-detection is unreliable): CONTINUE iff >= 1 saved checkpoint by 300k is constraint-clean (all-seed max tilt < 15 deg AND all-seed max coupling stress < 365.6 N) AND reaches matched joint-success >= C_min (0.75) on the selection set S. Else STOP the from-scratch primary and trigger the escalation. The residual escalation catches the genuine slow-converger case. Caps wasted from-scratch spend at ~300k.
stage3_init_conditional.escalation: residual-on-impedance — a learned residual policy anchored on the hand-built cooperative-impedance ego (chamber.benchmarks.cocarry_ph.build_cooperative_ego / CoCarryImpedancePartner on the ego seat) that already solves the fixed task.
stage3_init_conditional.escalation_acceptance_criterion_LOCKED_N: If triggered, the escalation MUST conform to this committed spec (so the later build is not shaped post-hoc): anchor = the cooperative-impedance base; the learned component is a residual on the anchor's action; SAME selection rule (earliest constraint-clean max-success checkpoint on S); SAME held-out validation bar (V >= 0.90 with comfortable margins); SAME freeze manifest v2 + SHA reload. The base-vs-incumbent diagnostic is MANDATORY on the residual path (quantifies the residual's added value over the base).
stage3_init_conditional.escalation_build_note: The training loop currently exposes NO base/residual hook (verified). The build is DEFERRED until the 300k early-STOP fires AND the founder has given the Stage-3 go-ahead. The METHOD is pre-registered here, so building the plumbing later does not violate the prereg (it conforms to the locked acceptance criterion above).
stage3_init_conditional.encoded_as: primary + hard-cutoff early-stop + escalation are ONE conditional in this single locked tag. No goalpost-moving: the branch is fixed before any training step.

refreeze.selection_rule: Among the constraint-clean checkpoints (all-seed max tilt < 15 deg AND all-seed max coupling stress < 365.6 N) at MAXIMUM matched joint-success on the disjoint selection set S, pick the EARLIEST. Deterministic eval (P6).
refreeze.validation_acceptance: matched joint-success on the disjoint V >= 0.90 (reach band) AND comfortable margins (max tilt strictly < 15 deg without edge-riding; coupling stress p90 + max comfortably < 365.6 N). SHA-256 byte-identical reload verified.
refreeze.stop_gate: If NEITHER path reaches the matched reference (V >= 0.90) -> STOP: substrate not ready (an AS-class training failure caught cheaply). Report; do NOT fabricate an incumbent and do NOT proceed to the arms.

base_vs_incumbent_diagnostic.why: Quantifies what the learning actually adds and directly defuses the 'is it really a learned incumbent' critique (mandatory on the residual escalation). Founder-requested.
base_vs_incumbent_diagnostic.what: On the matched fixed task, paired with the matched cocarry_impedance partner, compare (a) the hand-built cooperative-impedance ego ALONE vs (b) the learned frozen incumbent. Report both joint-success rates + per-conjunct breakdown on the validation set V.
base_vs_incumbent_diagnostic.interpretation: Recorded as a diagnostic, not a gate. A learned incumbent that merely matches the base controller is honestly reported as such (and strengthens the case for from-scratch over residual).

capability_gate.rule: Every partner (Arm A AND Arm B) must clear an INDEPENDENT competence check: paired with the COOPERATIVE-REFERENCE EGO (matched cocarry_impedance on the ego seat — NOT the frozen incumbent), joint success on the calibration seeds >= C_min. A JOINT drop in the measurement is then attributable to mismatch / non-co-design, not to a weak teammate.
capability_gate.pairing_is_cooperative_reference_NOT_inc: Calibrating against the frozen incumbent would gate on the very outcome being measured (it would exclude precisely the partners that reveal the effect — circular). The pairing is the cooperative reference; the gate is incumbent-INDEPENDENT by design.
capability_gate.re_run_fresh_this_rung: Calibration is RE-MEASURED fresh under THIS rung's substrate (compliant K=8000, stress_measure=coupling, f_max 365.6). Rung-3's admitted/excluded roster does NOT transfer.
capability_gate.c_min_derivation: C_min = max(0.75, M - 0.25) with M = the matched teammate's calibrated score (~1.0). Fixed at pre-statement; NEVER weakened.
capability_gate.arm_b_min_competent_variants: At least 2 of the 3 Arm-B variants must clear the C_min independent-competence gate to PROCEED to a CD-axis claim (the >= 2-variant replication requirement cannot be satisfied otherwise). If 0 competent -> STOP (cannot test non-co-design with an incompetent partner). If exactly 1 competent -> STOP / feasibility-note: a single competent variant can neither support a replicated drop nor a strong null; report as a feasibility finding, do NOT issue a CD-axis verdict. >= 2 competent -> proceed.
capability_gate.exclusion_caveat: The gate truncates heterogeneity from above (biases Δ toward zero). On a null, report 'among capability-matched partners, no qualifying drop was observed' — never 'co-design does not couple to cooperation'. The excluded roster is archived with this directional-bias caveat.

arms.isolation_statement: Arm A and Arm B partners are IDENTICAL in body (Panda), impedance class, and ALL physical/dynamical parameters (gains, damping, step limit), differing ONLY in the COORDINATION OBJECTIVE. With that, an Arm-B drop is attributable to co-design BY CONSTRUCTION — this isolation IS the mediation guarantee (see cooperation_mediation). Held byte-identical across both arms and the matched reference: same frozen incumbent, same compliant coupling K=8000, same invariant coupling-stress instrument, same f_max 365.6, same success predicate + 0.10 m radius, same 320-tick horizon, same Panda body.

arm_a_control.label: capability-matched, CO-DESIGNED control-style partners (vary control STYLE within the shared cooperative objective).
also_gate_tested: cocarry_nullspace_impedance (re-run through the gate this rung; expected EXCLUDED at C_min as in Rung-3)
arm_a_control.expectation: null. The ADR-026-faithful matched/policy-style result, now against the TRAINED incumbent rather than the stand-in.

arm_b_decisive.label: independently-competent but NON-co-designed partners — the matched-impedance controller with the cooperative joint objective REPLACED by a self-interested own-objective (a partner you cannot co-optimise).
arm_b_decisive.construction: Each variant is the matched cocarry_impedance class with MATCHED gains/dynamics, differing ONLY in its reference/objective. Same body, same seat, same FrozenPartner interface; reads only its own qpos + the task goal/bar leaves (I3); BLIND to the joint internal coupling stress (never observes or optimises it). This is the Rung-2-STOP regime.

variants_T1.objective: tracks its OWN bar end to a self-referenced goal, ignoring the partner / the joint task.
minimises its OWN control effort while nominally holding its end (a lazy-but-competent contributor).
keeps its OWN end at a self-referenced setpoint regardless of joint transport (a station-keeper).

arm_b_decisive.variant_competence_note: each variant is tuned to PASS C_min when paired with the cooperative reference (so a measured drop is non-co-design, not incompetence) — tuned UP on its OWN-objective competence ONLY, never toward joint-stress awareness (that would re-introduce co-design). A variant that cannot clear C_min is EXCLUDED with the directional-bias caveat.
arm_b_decisive.replication_requirement: A CD-axis DROP is claimed ONLY if the pooled drop qualifies AND it REPLICATES across >= 2 admitted variants (per-variant Δ >= Δ_min with CI excluding 0 for at least two variants). A single-variant drop is reported as a single-partner signal, NOT an axis claim (guards against a single hand-built-adversary artifact; restores symmetry with Arm A's family).

escalation_tiers_FOUNDER_GATED.T2: a learned partner trained against a DIFFERENT ego/objective, then frozen and transferred in without retuning.
escalation_tiers_FOUNDER_GATED.T3: a foundation-model / general capable policy per ADR-009/010.
escalation_tiers_FOUNDER_GATED.gate: Escalation past the T1 hand-built variants requires a founder checkpoint (R-PPL-01 capacity guard). NOT pre-spent; NOT a within-run lever. Run only if the T1 set is null.

arm_b_decisive.body: Panda (same as Arm A — embodiment, the established null, is NOT re-introduced; the only thing varying vs Arm A is the coordination objective).

delta_min_basis: joint success-rate paired Δ = reference - shifted. Δ_min stays 0.20 (consistent with Rung-3). Adequacy is sized by the committed power sim (cocarry_rung5_power_sim.json), NOT by a naive 'power at Δ_min' claim — see power_and_null_scoping.

power_and_null_scoping.structural_note: Under the committed rule (pooled mean Δ >= Δ_min AND one-sided 95% CI lower > 0), power AT a true effect exactly = Δ_min asymptotes near ~0.5 (the sample mean clears its own mean ~half the time). So '80% power at Δ_min' is unreachable by adding n; the Δ_min-scoped null is judged as an EQUIVALENCE test instead.
power_and_null_scoping.adequacy_rule_met: P[null|Δ=0] >= 0.95 (=1.00) AND P[null|Δ=Δ_min] <= 0.10 (=0.05) AND power[drop|Δ=0.25] >= 0.85 (=0.88). n=28 is the smallest n meeting all three AND sits in the pre-stated 24-30 robustness band.
power_and_null_scoping.null_claim_scoping: A declared null is stated as an EQUIVALENCE bound, NOT a power claim: 'the measurement decisively excludes effects >= 25 pp (0.88 power) AND, when a null is declared, the two-sided 95% CI upper bound places the effect below 20 pp' — never 'powered to 80% at 0.20' (structurally ~0.5).
power_and_null_scoping.drop_claim_scoping: The DROP side is unchanged: pooled mean Δ >= Δ_min (0.20) AND one-sided 95% CI lower > 0; magnitude-primary.

seed_disjointness: Train root_seed=0; selection S=50000-50011; validation V=51000-51023; matched-coupling distribution=52000-52011; calibration=53000-53011; measurement=54000-54027. All disjoint from each other AND from every prior rung (Rung-2 S=10000s/V=20000s; Rung-3 measure=30000s/calib=40000s).
measurement_design: Eval-only, paired within-seed on the SAME 28 measurement seeds: the reference (frozen incumbent + matched cocarry_impedance) and each shifted condition (frozen incumbent + each admitted partner). The reference is reconfirmed first; if it does not reach >= 0.90 the run STOPs (something changed) before any shifted arm is trusted. One deterministic episode per seed.
pooling_method: Pooled Δ = reference_rate - mean_over_partners(shifted_rate), each admitted partner weighted equally; per-partner Δ also reported (for the Arm-B replication check). Cluster (seed) bootstrap resamples the 28 paired seed-clusters with replacement, recomputes pooled Δ each iteration (n_boot=10000; one-sided 95%; RNG via concerto.training.seeding.derive_substream, P6). Arm A and Arm B are pooled SEPARATELY.

decision_rule.arm_a: qualifying drop iff pooled mean Δ >= 0.20 AND the one-sided 95% CI lower bound > 0; else NULL (scoped per power_and_null_scoping). Expected null — the control.
decision_rule.arm_b: qualifying CD-axis drop iff pooled mean Δ >= 0.20 AND the one-sided 95% CI lower bound > 0 AND it REPLICATES across >= 2 admitted variants; else NULL. Isolation (arms identical except objective) is the mediation guarantee; the coupling-stress timecourse is a reported diagnostic, not a gate.
decision_rule.secondary: IQM (25%-trimmed) secondary, non-gate-bearing; cluster-robust binomial GLMM (statsmodels GEE, clustered by seed) confirmatory.

comparative_verdict_matrix.A_null_AND_B_null: CONCLUSIVE NEGATIVE on co-carry: heterogeneity does not bite even without co-design -> the cost, if it exists, requires a harder TASK regime. Pre-committed next (DOCUMENTED, NOT run this round): a contact-rich, asymmetric-role task. A rigorous, publishable null + benchmark.
comparative_verdict_matrix.A_null_AND_B_drop: THE THESIS LANDS WHERE PREDICTED: co-design / shared cooperation is the load-bearing variable; the matched arm is the control proving the effect is specifically the un-co-optimisable asymmetry.
comparative_verdict_matrix.A_drop: UNEXPECTED given priors. Pre-specified branch: report per rule, then INVESTIGATE a substrate regression (re-check Stage 1 rig re-validation + Stage 3 re-freeze validation) BEFORE any claim — a matched-control drop most likely signals the incumbent or substrate changed, not a real co-design effect.
comparative_verdict_matrix.no_goalpost_moving: An Arm-B null routes to the PRE-COMMITTED contact-rich task as a FUTURE regime; it does NOT license swapping in a harder partner mid-run to chase an effect (T2/T3 are founder-gated, not a within-run lever).

cooperation_mediation_check.primary_guarantee_ISOLATION: By construction Arm A and Arm B partners are identical in body, impedance class, and all physical/dynamical parameters, differing ONLY in the coordination objective. An Arm-B drop is therefore attributable to co-design (the objective), not to any static/physical property — this isolation IS the mediation. The zeroed-static-hold control is DROPPED (a dead-weight baseline confounded by non-transport).
cooperation_mediation_check.timecourse_diagnostic_REPORTED_not_gate: Pre-specified quantitative diagnostic (reported, never verdict-flipping): partition each episode into the ACTIVE-TRANSPORT window (settle_window <= step < placement) and the POST-SETTLE window (after is_placed). Compute the partner-attributable coupling-stress excess = (Arm-B p90 - matched-reference p90) in each window. EXPECTATION for a genuine cooperation-mediated drop: active-window excess > post-settle-window excess by a factor >= 1.5x (the conflict concentrates where active cooperation is demanded). Reported alongside the per-conjunct breakdown; a deviation is flagged and interpreted, not used to flip the verdict.

claim_scoping.null: 'no effect >= Δ_min (20 pp)' among capability-matched partners — stated via the equivalence bound (CI upper < 20 pp when declared; effects >= 25 pp decisively excluded). NOT 'co-design is inert' and NOT 'powered to 80% at 0.20'.
claim_scoping.arm_b_positive: 'a COMPETENT partner that does NOT share the joint-stress objective degrades cooperation by >= Δ_min, replicated across >= 2 variants' — NOT 'any non-co-designed partner'.
claim_scoping.scope_of_the_run: Phase-2 co-carry, this task, this incumbent, capability-matched partners. The M7 / M10-narrative / D-046 decision is the founder's, post-results.

stop_guards: Fewer than 2 Arm-B variants independently competent (C_min) -> STOP / feasibility-note (the >= 2-variant replication requirement cannot be met; no CD-axis verdict).
Re-freeze cannot reach the matched reference on V -> STOP (substrate not ready).
Matched reference fails to reconfirm at any stage -> STOP.
Stage-1 matched-coupling p99 outside [234, 318] N (f_max 365.6 not consistent: upper edge closed at 318 so the grounding rule + fixed f_max cannot cross) -> STOP.
A new confound isolated -> STOP + principled fix + report (never move f_max / C_min / predicate / the measure).
Never retrain the incumbent mid-measurement; never let the reward see partner identity; never mix couplings or stress measures across a comparison.
honesty_statement: As of this committed file, NO measurement on any of the seed sets 50000-54027 has been run, and the re-freeze has not been trained. Only the byte-identical-preserving env ceiling-consistency fix (Tier-1 verified) and the Stage-0 power simulation (no incumbent) are in place. Stages 1-7 run only AFTER this pre-registration is committed and git-tagged. Stages 1-2 (rig re-validation + partner competence checks) run AFTER the tag precisely so the C_min partner gate is not tuned before locking.
repro_commands: (Stage 0) commit + git tag prereg-cocarry-rung5-codesign-2026-06-20  # THIS file (de-DRAFT), the env fix, the Arm-B partner variants, the power sim — BEFORE any measurement

(Stage 1) python -m scripts.repro._cocarry_rung5_rig_revalidate     # matched ref ~1.0, single-arm ~0, coupling binds, invariance <=~1 N, matched-coupling p99 + f_max 365.6 reconfirm + penalty grounding
(Stage 2) python -m scripts.repro._cocarry_rung5_calibrate          # Arm A + Arm B independent-competence C_min gate (vs cooperative reference); admitted/excluded roster

(Stage 3) python -m scripts.repro._cocarry_rung5_refreeze           # HEAVY — from-scratch primary + hard 300k early-stop + (escalation) ; selection on S, validation on V, SHA reload, manifest v2  [HARD STOP for founder go-ahead before launch]
(Stage 4) python -m scripts.repro._cocarry_rung5_arm_a              # eval-only Arm-A Δ + CI + per-conjunct vs the frozen incumbent (n=28)
(Stage 5) python -m scripts.repro._cocarry_rung5_arm_b              # eval-only Arm-B Δ + CI + per-conjunct + replication + timecourse diagnostic (n=28)
(Stage 6/7) python -m scripts.repro._cocarry_rung5_verdict          # comparative verdict matrix + synthesis
premortem_register: R-RES-01 (cooperation-proof risk): Arm B either un-arms this risk (a real, predicted positive) or definitively closes it (a conclusive negative routing to the harder-task regime). Named in the Stage-7 synthesis. This is the last large axis-measurement spend before the founder's M7 / M10 / D-046 call.
